| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, DECEMBER 21, 2020
SENATORS LOEFFLER AND PERDUE TO DELIVER MORE BIPARTISAN RELIEF TO GEORGIA, BLAST DEMOCRATS FOR HOLDING COVID AID HOSTAGE FOR MONTHS
ATLANTA - Today, U.S. Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue issued the following statement on the latest bipartisan COVID-19 package set to pass later today:
"After months of Democrats playing politics with Americans' health and livelihoods by blocking additional relief for our families and small businesses, we finally have a path forward. During a crisis, we need proven leaders who can get things done. Together, we are delivering nearly $1 trillion in additional aid to the American people on top of the $3 trillion already disbursed. Over $47 billion has already gone directly to Georgia's families, farmers, front-line workers, schools, hospitals, and more is on the way. We secured additional funding for the successful Paycheck Protection Program, which helped so many of our small businesses stay open and saved over 1.5 million Georgia jobs. We provided two rounds of relief checks to help everyone make ends meet. We made sure our schools and hospitals have the resources they need to respond. We provided more support to our farmers during this challenging year. We also helped our airlines retain their workers so they can keep flying. We developed and delivered a life-saving vaccine in record time so we can finally beat this virus. We will continue to take historic action to protect and rebuild our communities from this unprecedented crisis and we will not stop fighting for the people of Georgia.
"Sadly, but not surprisingly, Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi made this much harder than it ever needed to be, purposely holding up relief that could have been delivered months ago. Republicans have been voting to pass this relief since September -- but for Democrats, it's all politics all of the time and they voted it down until after the November election. Radical liberals Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock wouldn't challenge this heartless dysfunction -- they'd enable it. Both Ossoff and Warnock criticized relief and did not want to 'get bogged down in the details,' but that's what it takes to reach consensus and get real results. Instead, Ossoff and Warnock would be nothing but rubber stamps for Schumer's radical agenda in the U.S. Senate."
### Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qZjxVVXStS0AzQ5jJAI1I-oPRt_E9DCyavQwjBCf1MlR6fGWWrQfo0cggTtoFcusmyH_L_F3o8yVZ5Sp35gMgtGJtNgtOD5tou_ZTZlsazxd53GkEK7m0uLgxevFWz34v3hhulbLdws7FLmJjVkDCdIrfBv44A8t&c=drfp24_y-Mn2Aix-FjAGARDXVxGGr0lDX86Vac7c7LGqPqjo2LK1wA==&ch=Ns0SjlxbX45T_Ex8GiIESNXrG1K5Pvp5OViY2HTVbn_0NWETeNbecA==)

Friend,

Have you heard the news coming out of Wisconsin?

In a blatant attack on our Christmas traditions, Democratic Governor, Tony Evers has twice removed a Christmas tree put on display in the Wisconsin Capitol.

**When asked about the tree, he even refers to it as a "Holiday tree" to avoid saying Christmas!** These types of attacks on our long standing traditions are why we need to send a message to Governor Evers and Democrat Governors across the country! The war on Christmas will never stop unless we stand up TODAY and fight back against Democrats and their cancel culture.

clean_body: | | | | | | | == Friend, Have you heard the news coming out of Wisconsin? In a blatant attack on our Christmas traditions, Democratic Governor, Tony Evers has twice removed a Christmas tree put on display in the Wisconsin Capitol. When asked about the tree, he even refers to it as a "Holiday tree" to avoid saying Christmas! These types of attacks on our long standing traditions are why we need to send a message to Governor Evers and Democrat Governors across the country! The war on Christmas will never stop unless we stand up TODAY and fight back against Democrats and their cancel culture. == == == == == == If we don't continue fighting for the traditions we hold close to our hearts, it's only a matter of time until the Democrats rid our country of them. == Thank you, Republican Governors Association | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by the Republican Governors Association. clean_body: In order to DEFEND Georgia and our Republican Senate Majority on January 5th, our team has been setting daily fundraising goals to ensure that we have the resources necessary to WIN. And tonight we're facing our MOST AMBITIOUS goal since it was announced that the Georgia races would go to a runoff. Unfortunately, we're still short of our goal with just a few hours remaining. Dear Friend, In order to DEFEND Georgia and our Republican Senate Majority on January 5th, our team has been setting daily fundraising goals to ensure that we have the resources necessary to WIN. And, Friend, tonight we're facing our MOST AMBITIOUS goal since it was announced that the Georgia races would go to a runoff. Unfortunately, we 're still short of our goal with just a few hours remaining. Now, we could just give up on the most ambitious goal of our conservative movement, but I've never been one to back down when things get tough, and I know you don't either. We're still short $212,826, and while I know that is a lot, we have no choice but to reach this goal if we're going to be able to defeat Chuck Schumer, Raphael Warnock, and Jon Ossoff on January 5th. == Can you help, Friend? == I wouldn't be reaching out if it wasn't CRITICAL, Friend, but the Georgia runoffs are currently TIED and we need to reach this goal if we're going to pull ahead. I've always been able to count on the members of this team in the past, == == == == == == == == == These races are so close, Friend, so even the smallest of contributions could make the difference in Georgia. Remember, there are only a few weeks left, == Thank you for your help during this critical time. Mitch McConnell == == Text MITCH to 47360 to receive mobile alerts! name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: Sign the Petition!
body:
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.176282.aspx)
Dear Peter,
I am sending a quick update regarding the on-going fight for fair elections! I can make you this promise - I WILL NOT STOP FIGHTING. As I've said before, we have to play through the echo of the whistle, and I plan on doing just that. But we NEED your help!
We are asking the Supreme Court to #HearOurCase and find that Governor Wolf has acted outside the scope of the Pennsylvania Constitution when he signed Act 77. This is YOUR opportunity for your voice to be heard! Let's show the nation that the people of Pennsylvania will not sit on the sidelines. Please sign the [petition](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/51.176282.aspx) TODAY and forward this email to your friends! If you have social media, use the attached link and the tag line #HearOurCase to share!
**_Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America!_**
My best,
_Mike_
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.176282.aspx)

clean_body: Dear Peter, I am sending a quick update regarding the on-going fight for fair elections! I can make you this promise - I WILL NOT STOP FIGHTING. As I've said before, we have to play through the echo of the whistle, and I plan on doing just that. But we NEED your help! We are asking the Supreme Court to #HearOurCase and find that Governor Wolf has acted outside the scope of the Pennsylvania Constitution when he signed Act 77. This is YOUR opportunity for your voice to be heard! Let's show the nation that the people of Pennsylvania will not sit on the sidelines. Please sign the TODAY and forward this email to your friends! If you have social media, use the attached link and the tag line #HearOurCase to share! Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America! My best, Mike P.S. You can like our , follow us on , or contribute to my campaign at . Your contributions are greatly appreciated! |

name: Congresswoman-elect Stephanie Bice
subject: Congratulate a fellow conservative!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bice for Congress
body:
Ashley Hinson and I were among the ten Republican women who flipped Democrat held seats, and I could not be more honored to join her in the important fight to preserve our conservative values.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CQSQhP4USyWOCEbFLzrUs1mDTbrYAAegRgxUF41uAIHoMBUWVCGB1MpS4ZoJJIKKHrYCc4lq2i7CN5d2FKl9hRjtuV2DHUk02B449ezVwX40FWGapndPU7KkDMH04MKVvaHAEaJ0AqM-HVdw-HD1KOFto9rERdY6hHsB7onumTXHfqpS-yGsTzKqnDkH87tjFE_v4kjXaAdp88AK2bDVsZL38ceS3Lk7YhW-qDwOclUBU8jLePRfGBVrVRa0BPp0MvYutt9hSKZ__Kiwguq_6Q1KfMqNxqYzBwpuwMbWnH-LLBGiIlmKvH8v8B11Js_4cJcKh_nUFuk3W-xiZ1M2gQeuGSeE8ew7vFOibpURYVp2YUehEamEM8kQaE1tjxdw7ZuieQVax6X7Xnr3HJ870sSRBMQUBYMgzeBqDkV55ELFzKVXobFkZjHh_5HLe6NK&c=iIfFSSZ3e0ugyyKvvsuATYlhh_JKhFZdMNxtGrv6uYE8yMR-NurjZg==&ch=4eLfiz18GMdX-pSVpoVfkU49GgEdxqGmvwbGoYwWeFd4VGNt4wCYYQ==)
Hi Friend, As you know, 2020 was one of the most impressive years for Republican women running for Congress. I am thrilled to be heading to Washington, D.C. alongside another proven conservative and common sense leader in Ashley Hinson from Iowa's 1st district. Ashley was able to defeat the Democratic incumbent due to the strength of grassroots supporters and loyal conservatives who wanted a change in Congress. Ashley and I were among the 10 Republican women who flipped Democrat held seats, and I could not be more honored to join her in the important fight to preserve our conservative values. The victories here in OK-05 and in IA-01 were no easy feat, which is why I am asking you to spare one minute to sign my card congratulating Ashley and more fellow Congresswomen-elect on their incredible wins! **[**SIGN THE CARD!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CQSQhP4USyWOCEbFLzrUs1mDTbrYAAegRgxUF41uAIHoMBUWVCGB1MpS4ZoJJIKKHrYCc4lq2i7CN5d2FKl9hRjtuV2DHUk02B449ezVwX40FWGapndPU7KkDMH04MKVvaHAEaJ0AqM-HVdw-HD1KOFto9rERdY6hHsB7onumTXHfqpS-yGsTzKqnDkH87tjFE_v4kjXaAdp88AK2bDVsZL38ceS3Lk7YhW-qDwOclUBU8jLePRfGBVrVRa0BPp0MvYutt9hSKZ__Kiwguq_6Q1KfMqNxqYzBwpuwMbWnH-LLBGiIlmKvH8v8B11Js_4cJcKh_nUFuk3W-xiZ1M2gQeuGSeE8ew7vFOibpURYVp2YUehEamEM8kQaE1tjxdw7ZuieQVax6X7Xnr3HJ870sSRBMQUBYMgzeBqDkV55ELFzKVXobFkZjHh_5HLe6NK&c=iIfFSSZ3e0ugyyKvvsuATYlhh_JKhFZdMNxtGrv6uYE8yMR-NurjZg==&ch=4eLfiz18GMdX-pSVpoVfkU49GgEdxqGmvwbGoYwWeFd4VGNt4wCYYQ==)** **[**SAY CONGRATULATIONS!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CQSQhP4USyWOCEbFLzrUs1mDTbrYAAegRgxUF41uAIHoMBUWVCGB1MpS4ZoJJIKKHrYCc4lq2i7CN5d2FKl9hRjtuV2DHUk02B449ezVwX40FWGapndPU7KkDMH04MKVvaHAEaJ0AqM-HVdw-HD1KOFto9rERdY6hHsB7onumTXHfqpS-yGsTzKqnDkH87tjFE_v4kjXaAdp88AK2bDVsZL38ceS3Lk7YhW-qDwOclUBU8jLePRfGBVrVRa0BPp0MvYutt9hSKZ__Kiwguq_6Q1KfMqNxqYzBwpuwMbWnH-LLBGiIlmKvH8v8B11Js_4cJcKh_nUFuk3W-xiZ1M2gQeuGSeE8ew7vFOibpURYVp2YUehEamEM8kQaE1tjxdw7ZuieQVax6X7Xnr3HJ870sSRBMQUBYMgzeBqDkV55ELFzKVXobFkZjHh_5HLe6NK&c=iIfFSSZ3e0ugyyKvvsuATYlhh_JKhFZdMNxtGrv6uYE8yMR-NurjZg==&ch=4eLfiz18GMdX-pSVpoVfkU49GgEdxqGmvwbGoYwWeFd4VGNt4wCYYQ==)** **[**SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE WOMEN!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CQSQhP4USyWOCEbFLzrUs1mDTbrYAAegRgxUF41uAIHoMBUWVCGB1MpS4ZoJJIKKHrYCc4lq2i7CN5d2FKl9hRjtuV2DHUk02B449ezVwX40FWGapndPU7KkDMH04MKVvaHAEaJ0AqM-HVdw-HD1KOFto9rERdY6hHsB7onumTXHfqpS-yGsTzKqnDkH87tjFE_v4kjXaAdp88AK2bDVsZL38ceS3Lk7YhW-qDwOclUBU8jLePRfGBVrVRa0BPp0MvYutt9hSKZ__Kiwguq_6Q1KfMqNxqYzBwpuwMbWnH-LLBGiIlmKvH8v8B11Js_4cJcKh_nUFuk3W-xiZ1M2gQeuGSeE8ew7vFOibpURYVp2YUehEamEM8kQaE1tjxdw7ZuieQVax6X7Xnr3HJ870sSRBMQUBYMgzeBqDkV55ELFzKVXobFkZjHh_5HLe6NK&c=iIfFSSZ3e0ugyyKvvsuATYlhh_JKhFZdMNxtGrv6uYE8yMR-NurjZg==&ch=4eLfiz18GMdX-pSVpoVfkU49GgEdxqGmvwbGoYwWeFd4VGNt4wCYYQ==)** Thanks to the help of loyal grassroots supporters like you, I will join Ashley in Congress as we look to restore our conservative values and return the House of Representatives to the people. By strengthening our economy, improving our education system, and vowing to protect the lives of the unborn, I know we can make a difference in Washington. _**Friend, will you stand by us as we head to Congress and take a moment to sign our card?**_ **[**SIGN THE CARD!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CQSQhP4USyWOCEbFLzrUs1mDTbrYAAegRgxUF41uAIHoMBUWVCGB1MpS4ZoJJIKKHrYCc4lq2i7CN5d2FKl9hRjtuV2DHUk02B449ezVwX40FWGapndPU7KkDMH04MKVvaHAEaJ0AqM-HVdw-HD1KOFto9rERdY6hHsB7onumTXHfqpS-yGsTzKqnDkH87tjFE_v4kjXaAdp88AK2bDVsZL38ceS3Lk7YhW-qDwOclUBU8jLePRfGBVrVRa0BPp0MvYutt9hSKZ__Kiwguq_6Q1KfMqNxqYzBwpuwMbWnH-LLBGiIlmKvH8v8B11Js_4cJcKh_nUFuk3W-xiZ1M2gQeuGSeE8ew7vFOibpURYVp2YUehEamEM8kQaE1tjxdw7ZuieQVax6X7Xnr3HJ870sSRBMQUBYMgzeBqDkV55ELFzKVXobFkZjHh_5HLe6NK&c=iIfFSSZ3e0ugyyKvvsuATYlhh_JKhFZdMNxtGrv6uYE8yMR-NurjZg==&ch=4eLfiz18GMdX-pSVpoVfkU49GgEdxqGmvwbGoYwWeFd4VGNt4wCYYQ==)** I know I speak for proud Republican women like Ashley when I say that we will work hard for you in Congress, because you fought for us and helped us win back these critical House seats from Democrat incumbents last month. Please join us as we stand up to Nancy Pelosi and her allies in Congress, and never stop fighting for our shared conservative values! Thank you for your support,
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CQSQhP4USyWOCEbFLzrUs1mDTbrYAAegRgxUF41uAIHoMBUWVCGB1MpS4ZoJJIKKHrYCc4lq2i7CN5d2FKl9hRjtuV2DHUk02B449ezVwX40FWGapndPU7KkDMH04MKVvaHAEaJ0AqM-HVdw-HD1KOFto9rERdY6hHsB7onumTXHfqpS-yGsTzKqnDkH87tjFE_v4kjXaAdp88AK2bDVsZL38ceS3Lk7YhW-qDwOclUBU8jLePRfGBVrVRa0BPp0MvYutt9hSKZ__Kiwguq_6Q1KfMqNxqYzBwpuwMbWnH-LLBGiIlmKvH8v8B11Js_4cJcKh_nUFuk3W-xiZ1M2gQeuGSeE8ew7vFOibpURYVp2YUehEamEM8kQaE1tjxdw7ZuieQVax6X7Xnr3HJ870sSRBMQUBYMgzeBqDkV55ELFzKVXobFkZjHh_5HLe6NK&c=iIfFSSZ3e0ugyyKvvsuATYlhh_JKhFZdMNxtGrv6uYE8yMR-NurjZg==&ch=4eLfiz18GMdX-pSVpoVfkU49GgEdxqGmvwbGoYwWeFd4VGNt4wCYYQ==) Congresswoman-elect Stephanie Bice

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aDLkiLR6jGBoYEO4v8B5WWwNf0P0MgtlH0XFuyT68cTRwsdyIj0FRCrL28wSYpEC_0JaIiqrrPZhe_XM498bOstBUcQExupHR9U87ariSiv0d8sd5jEYhlZivoJqfg38dLuI7d7m_IMzPWMYZToo_Xm27rtiZJuULBNVKKcg90mFwnTIqnUUHebNE6jJwdJP8Z0ATS7gI1jpjCNKunKlP2R0WDlb4372oQt8FTxu6w25EfgZD1Zg5xFbsm1bZmnMTtQFN8B1yrqQev8IAHQB2CJgsXaypr4ZIMu7HGQeiXG7eDSN21wlmoZIG5XSbpz7E1atKjYBiQi4mBf1M_AeKCK6W6wSzDMEeHMHaVdsYffugcsg5c4k3vUPHMMY5a9FI4wj9JTnjcqx050n_oSnMm3_60v7yOsPbRNSbOCawfQ20G1Uj4NXSg==&c=OJqnkwglrXkkDvg6N6VF2qO5xkeLoBlJAinideQx6YtZyYn2UOVjTA==&ch=JMd1csjS1uMLcmbhwFd7S6CNjyQ0K5a24v5DcSLnyjWYxUlOgjnOCQ==)
Friend, as you probably already know, we are quickly approaching what is the most critical Senate runoff election in United States history. We have only 15 days remaining, and early voting has begun.

That being said, let's take a peek at what is _really_ on the ballot:

_****THE BALLOT IN GEORGIA****_
---
* _Defunding the police_ OR **supporting our great law enforcement?**
* _Socialist state control that has left countless nations ravaged_ OR **the free market that has allowed our economy to flourish?**
* _Tyranny_ OR **liberty?**
* _Open borders_ OR **a secured nation?**
* _Sky high taxes_ OR T**rump 's tax cuts?**
* _Cancel culture and your thoughts dictated by the liberal mob_ OR **freedom of speech and expression?**

**How important is it for you to wake up on January 6th emerging victorious?** Knowing that you fought for your country and your country fought for you? Knowing that the great American experiment will continue to live on? Knowing that the socialist threat has been contained?

Friend, if you care about any of the above- **[now is the time to ac](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aDLkiLR6jGBoYEO4v8B5WWwNf0P0MgtlH0XFuyT68cTRwsdyIj0FRCrL28wSYpEC_0JaIiqrrPZhe_XM498bOstBUcQExupHR9U87ariSiv0d8sd5jEYhlZivoJqfg38dLuI7d7m_IMzPWMYZToo_Xm27rtiZJuULBNVKKcg90mFwnTIqnUUHebNE6jJwdJP8Z0ATS7gI1jpjCNKunKlP2R0WDlb4372oQt8FTxu6w25EfgZD1Zg5xFbsm1bZmnMTtQFN8B1yrqQev8IAHQB2CJgsXaypr4ZIMu7HGQeiXG7eDSN21wlmoZIG5XSbpz7E1atKjYBiQi4mBf1M_AeKCK6W6wSzDMEeHMHaVdsYffugcsg5c4k3vUPHMMY5a9FI4wj9JTnjcqx050n_oSnMm3_60v7yOsPbRNSbOCawfQ20G1Uj4NXSg==&c=OJqnkwglrXkkDvg6N6VF2qO5xkeLoBlJAinideQx6YtZyYn2UOVjTA==&ch=JMd1csjS1uMLcmbhwFd7S6CNjyQ0K5a24v5DcSLnyjWYxUlOgjnOCQ==)**[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aDLkiLR6jGBoYEO4v8B5WWwNf0P0MgtlH0XFuyT68cTRwsdyIj0FRCrL28wSYpEC_0JaIiqrrPZhe_XM498bOstBUcQExupHR9U87ariSiv0d8sd5jEYhlZivoJqfg38dLuI7d7m_IMzPWMYZToo_Xm27rtiZJuULBNVKKcg90mFwnTIqnUUHebNE6jJwdJP8Z0ATS7gI1jpjCNKunKlP2R0WDlb4372oQt8FTxu6w25EfgZD1Zg5xFbsm1bZmnMTtQFN8B1yrqQev8IAHQB2CJgsXaypr4ZIMu7HGQeiXG7eDSN21wlmoZIG5XSbpz7E1atKjYBiQi4mBf1M_AeKCK6W6wSzDMEeHMHaVdsYffugcsg5c4k3vUPHMMY5a9FI4wj9JTnjcqx050n_oSnMm3_60v7yOsPbRNSbOCawfQ20G1Uj4NXSg==&c=OJqnkwglrXkkDvg6N6VF2qO5xkeLoBlJAinideQx6YtZyYn2UOVjTA==&ch=JMd1csjS1uMLcmbhwFd7S6CNjyQ0K5a24v5DcSLnyjWYxUlOgjnOCQ==)[**t**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aDLkiLR6jGBoYEO4v8B5WWwNf0P0MgtlH0XFuyT68cTRwsdyIj0FRCrL28wSYpEC_0JaIiqrrPZhe_XM498bOstBUcQExupHR9U87ariSiv0d8sd5jEYhlZivoJqfg38dLuI7d7m_IMzPWMYZToo_Xm27rtiZJuULBNVKKcg90mFwnTIqnUUHebNE6jJwdJP8Z0ATS7gI1jpjCNKunKlP2R0WDlb4372oQt8FTxu6w25EfgZD1Zg5xFbsm1bZmnMTtQFN8B1yrqQev8IAHQB2CJgsXaypr4ZIMu7HGQeiXG7eDSN21wlmoZIG5XSbpz7E1atKjYBiQi4mBf1M_AeKCK6W6wSzDMEeHMHaVdsYffugcsg5c4k3vUPHMMY5a9FI4wj9JTnjcqx050n_oSnMm3_60v7yOsPbRNSbOCawfQ20G1Uj4NXSg==&c=OJqnkwglrXkkDvg6N6VF2qO5xkeLoBlJAinideQx6YtZyYn2UOVjTA==&ch=JMd1csjS1uMLcmbhwFd7S6CNjyQ0K5a24v5DcSLnyjWYxUlOgjnOCQ==)[**.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aDLkiLR6jGBoYEO4v8B5WWwNf0P0MgtlH0XFuyT68cTRwsdyIj0FRCrL28wSYpEC_0JaIiqrrPZhe_XM498bOstBUcQExupHR9U87ariSiv0d8sd5jEYhlZivoJqfg38dLuI7d7m_IMzPWMYZToo_Xm27rtiZJuULBNVKKcg90m %%first name%%, it's David Perdue.

Friend, it's David Perdue.

My Senate seat is in real danger in Georgia, which is why [**I need your support**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tVqisYeMn1p0pg1l6K_wYpU1-vlFyF6tNorzcBWnhDFd-gCdRqvHSrxTxmZdmAm7ZvE1xvXqB0pRvC1o5p0yQvoRCM9_WPEipxCYKpxFrg0DMRhsa5fojn5l2sl_t1ZS4PyBZFnzzgg4T0cEuf-GksPygDg0joYeV9joUm_UrRWVQaZE7WbgvPRu3VTQhZzKDaJJyNPL89l971LUy6xjB0DZIIGhnOhHxVx_d26jDNI4BNHoGCdYiY7eAmjSk82XlD6fPWZCMeT89SS3-vQvOcQWTfnjJC6KMztMqwhjYi2Vf2fx9ksvv_0R-kn32PAzrONkTSeeQqSxjsLyX7jDEtyySZzXD0C3KBazNIl94FdHTDr2n4a22Q7FnwqxCnnm49M1XFesyxSb6vioN6pBIH0BpFAKLCI8vRGUOWzOb3Yq14EZNrfZXvHzIuf79nmqs6aStHsYls4=&c=o_T2fFmaUUFVqU14B3D_1e9HzWkwuZhoEQ3VnHBrgbBELqeYl8Plqw==&ch=HSd0CxQ1a-KRo54xDlt2xUqRHjNrZF6Qbs8jQ5RhmCV29yYyDKTfbg==) now more than ever to guarantee that we cross the finish line strong on January 5th.

Control of the Senate runs through Georgia, which means not only is my seat in danger, but so is our Majority. That is why I need you to [_**rush a $15 contribution to keep our state and Senate RED. **_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tVqisYeMn1p0pg1l6K_wYpU1-vlFyF6tNorzcBWnhDFd-gCdRqvHSrxTxmZdmAm7ZvE1xvXqB0pRvC1o5p0yQvoRCM9_WPEipxCYKpxFrg0DMRhsa5fojn5l2sl_t1ZS4PyBZFnzzgg4T0cEuf-GksPygDg0joYeV9joUm_UrRWVQaZE7WbgvPRu3VTQhZzKDaJJyNPL89l971LUy6xjB0DZIIGhnOhHxVx_d26jDNI4BNHoGCdYiY7eAmjSk82XlD6fPWZCMeT89SS3-vQvOcQWTfnjJC6KMztMqwhjYi2Vf2fx9ksvv_0R-kn32PAzrONkTSeeQqSxjsLyX7jDEtyySZzXD0C3KBazNIl94FdHTDr2n4a22Q7FnwqxCnnm49M1XFesyxSb6vioN6pBIH0BpFAKLCI8vRGUOWzOb3Yq14EZNrfZXvHzIuf79nmqs6aStHsYls4=&c=o_T2fFmaUUFVqU14B3D_1e9HzWkwuZhoEQ3VnHBrgbBELqeYl8Plqw==&ch=HSd0CxQ1a-KRo54xDlt2xUqRHjNrZF6Qbs8jQ5RhmCV29yYyDKTfbg==)

I know $15 might not seem like it would make a difference but _**if EVERY grassroots supporter reading this chipped in just $15, we 'd be able to save Georgia and our Senate from the far-Left.**_

**Without your support RIGHT NOW, we risk losing EVERYTHING. **

[**So will you chip in just $15?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tVqisYeMn1p0pg1l6K_wYpU1-vlFyF6tNorzcBWnhDFd-gCdRqvHSrxTxmZdmAm7ZvE1xvXqB0pRvC1o5p0yQvoRCM9_WPEipxCYKpxFrg0DMRhsa5fojn5l2sl_t1ZS4PyBZFnzzgg4T0cEuf-GksPygDg0joYeV9joUm_UrRWVQaZE7WbgvPRu3VTQhZzKDaJJyNPL89l971LUy6xjB0DZIIGhnOhHxVx_d26jDNI4BNHoGCdYiY7eAmjSk82XlD6fPWZCMeT89SS3-vQvOcQWTfnjJC6KMztMqwhjYi2Vf2fx9ksvv_0R-kn32PAzrONkTSeeQqSxjsLyX7jDEtyySZzXD0C3KBazNIl94FdHTDr2n4a22Q7FnwqxCnnm49M1XFesyxSb6vioN6pBIH0BpFAKLCI8vRGUOWzOb3Yq14EZNrfZXvHzIuf79nmqs6aStHsYls4=&c=o_T2fFmaUUFVqU14B3D_1e9HzWkwuZhoEQ3VnHBrgbBELqeYl8Plqw==&ch=HSd0CxQ1a-KRo54xDlt2xUqRHjNrZF6Qbs8jQ5RhmCV29yYyDKTfbg==)

Thank you,

David Perdue

subject: Save America, Due Process for Pres. Trump, & Christmas! Week of December 21st Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
First, this is Christmas week, and I know there that many people will be busy and spending time celebrating – which we all should do! So, I am asking you to do as much as you can before Christmas, and then be sure to stop and celebrate – with family, if possible! No matter what, Christmas should be a joyous celebration.

For the action items, there are some you can do from home, and some you can do in-person in Georgia, if possible. Our country is teetering on the edge, and we absolutely must win those runoff races in Georgia, so whatever you can do this week, before Christmas, to help with this effort could be the action that saves America.

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
SAVE AMERICA – SECURE THE SENATE!
**Volunteer for Get Out The Vote Activities from Home**
You can print out a letter we’ve already written and mail them to voters, you can text voters, or you can call voters, all from the comfort of your own home! We cannot emphasize enough how important this is, and how we need many more volunteers. We need you to volunteer over the next few weeks and we need you to recruit others to volunteer as well. Please sign up today!
[SECURE THE SENATE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZngwNlZIVGJFRkZBTE41TGVsUHc1SFBiSnZqdS1QN19kZ3BOTTNHeUdLOTU4eWJRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MzE1OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=DhdhfhJUJ3NT6JlL7XYd4A)
|
---
**Volunteer as a Public Poll Observer in Georgia**
Sign up to volunteer in Georgia! At the moment we do not have funding for travel or expenses, but we need to find volunteers who will help with the public observation of canvassing of the votes. _NOTE: These are not official poll watcher positions, who in Georgia must be assigned by a political party, but they are similar._ You will observe what is happening as absentee and provisional ballots are being processed and tabulated in the Board of Elections offices.
[VOLUNTEER IN GEORGIA](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTY19TRnpJLTlYWHRJQVhJeWI3WkZ2SEtRMjdIZHh4cXVHdlpJaUhSMFdwb3poaDlnL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MzE1OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=v1v4aqG9zlfX_0ZTAAMBhA)
|
---
**Attend Election Events in Georgia**
If you are able to attend any of the many tour bus stops happening across Georgia, please do! Help David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler build momentum and get the word out about how important it is for Georgians to not only make sure they vote, but to make sure they vote Republican!
[SAVE AMERICA BUS TOUR](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2F2ZWFtZXJpY2F0b3VyLmNvbS9idXN0b3VyP21pZD00MzE1OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=rDolzmd247UC5wP0O5aohw)
|
---
Despite what Democrats and the Mainstream Media want you to believe, the Presidential election is not over. And we will continue to work on fairness and transparency for this election and future elections.

We commend the actions of Sen. Ron Johnson, Rep. Andy Biggs, Director of National Intelligence John Ratcliffe and many other patriots for having the courage to stand for free and fair elections. Each in their own right have taken tremendous steps toward uncovering the truth about voter fraud in the 2020 election.

While Democrats would like to ignore the rampant “irregularities" existent in the 2020 election, we will not rest until the American people can once again have trust in their electoral system.
|
---
CALL YOUR MEMBER OF CONGRESS
**Call your Senators and member of Congress** and tell them to **1) read the documents regarding[Election Irregularities and Issues](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1N0YXRlcy1FbGVjdGlvbi1JcnJlZ3VsYXJpdGllcy1hbmQtSXNzdWVzLVN0YW5kYXJkLnBkZj9taWQ9NDMxNTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_h_r_oLyfcv_gOWSYs3sRQ), [Georgia election fraud lawsuit](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1ZFUklGSUVELVBFVElUSU9OLVRPLUNPTlRFU1QtR0VPUkdJQS12MTAzMEZGLTAwMi5wZGY_bWlkPTQzMTU5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=szr0-gNx9Wmk0JXo2Dw3Tg), and [law in support of the petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL01lbW9yYW5kdW0tb2YtTGF3LWluLVN1cHBvcnQtb2YtUGV0aXRpb24tZm9yLUVsZWN0aW9uLUNvbnRlc3QucGRmP21pZD00MzE1OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=iuyt2JP_9_EwKIISzcbA7Q)**; and **2)[watch the Ron Johnson hearing from last week](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYy1zcGFuLm9yZy92aWRlby8_NTA3MjkyLTEvc2VuYXRlLWhlYXJpbmctZWxlY3Rpb24tc2VjdXJpdHktYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24mbWlkPTQzMTU5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=k7MgbhE4ldGK1kfoNSwFdA)**. Tell them to look at the evidence themselves, and to stop listening to the media claims that there is no evidence of fraud. Elective officials must do their own due diligence and research and stop depending on a corrupt and biased media to report the truth about the fraud. They must have the courage to do what is right, even if it is a politically difficult decision for them to make.

Simply call the Capitol Hill Switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and ask to be connected to your Senators or member of Congress or visit [our search page to find your Member of Congress](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9teS50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9jb250YWN0LWNvbmdyZXNzP21pZD00MzE1OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=IKMq63TrS17tv_i2o2Lq0g).

And, if you have a few extra minutes, email the links to the lawsuit and the hearing (linked above) to your Senators and Rep. as well.
|
---
As Christmas is quickly approaching, local Democrat leaders are proving that they are fully deserving of the lump of coal many of them will be receiving this year.

Instead of listening to the experts and reopening our great nation, allowing our houses of worship, schools and small businesses to flourish once again — local Democrat leaders are going back into lockdown mode.

Why? Because they feel their power starting to slip away. And the one thing we know to be true about those in power is once they have it, they will do whatever they can to not give it up.

So, instead of following the science and abiding by the Constitution, local Democrats leaders are pushing forward with new COVID restrictions, curfews, and lockdowns.
|
---
TELL THE SENATE TO SUPPORT DUE PROCESS
**[Sign our petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWlyZWxlY3Rpb24uYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDMxNTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=RGHNikLUFasDj9-ymBxsFw) to urge every United States senator to keep an open mind and to allow the legal and constitutional processes surrounding the election and its aftermath to move forward.** We urge you, do not arbitrarily refuse to consider challenges to a particular state’s electoral votes. People always speak of being on the “wrong side of history”; senators do not want to find themselves on the wrong side on this, where future generations of Americans will wonder why they refused to ensure everything was done to ensure only legal, legitimate votes elected the American President. After you sign, be sure to share it as well!

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWlyZWxlY3Rpb24uYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDMxNTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=eHSTCGXXjkUEuPv_oH1Bcw)

|

Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of December 21st
This week, we are learning about the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier. The tomb itself is interesting to learn about, but even more importantly is what it stands for – the brave American soldiers who died over the years in battle. It also allows us to discuss honor, patriotism, and the freedoms that are worth fighting and dying for in America. These are all topics that are not discussed anymore in many American schools.

It’s so important that we teach young people to honor our heroes. **Winston Churchill said, “A nation that fails to honor its heroes, soon will have no heroes to honor.”** Without an understanding of our American heroes, known or unknown, that ignorance paves the way to the hatred of America and our founding ideals that we see blossoming among too many young people today.

Arlington National Cemetery has a lovely and thorough write-up about the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier, with the background and meaning, and it would be interesting for older kids to read to themselves and then discuss with you. For younger kids, you could read the whole thing, or pick out parts, and then discuss it with them as well.

[Arlington National Cemetery: Tomb of the Unknown Soldier](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXJsaW5ndG9uY2VtZXRlcnkubWlsL0V4cGxvcmUvVG9tYi1vZi10aGUtVW5rbm93bi1Tb2xkaWVyP21pZD00MzE1OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Z4TQ2hqYNtHoXRRHX2ZXrQ)
|

STOP THE STEAL ACTIVITIES
* **A major protest is being planned for January 6th in Washington, DC by[StoptheSteal.us](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3N0b3B0aGVzdGVhbC51cy8_bWlkPTQzMTU5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=hiwo4EynNk6HvhfFZEwP5w).** January 6th is the day that Congress will meet to certify the Electoral College votes. If you are able to go, we encourage as many people showing up to support President Trump as possible.
* **[Please watch and share the videos in this You Tube playlist!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU2LWVhN2RhMDE3Y2Y1YjRiOTQ5NzE4NmJkYWY2M2JkMzA4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vcGxheWxpc3Q_bGlzdD1QTDJuWEM2dW85V1c3ckhPdTVjVHQ3eUtBMGRSYVFmM2NnJm1pZD00MzE1OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=HxxBogH20s-LkGf5IVbl1g)** They are video testimonials from poll watchers and other witnesses in Georgia who explain what they saw and why it was wrong.

In liberty,

Jenny Beth

clean_body: | | First, this is Christmas week, and I know there that many people will be busy and spending time celebrating – which we all should do! So, I am asking you to do as much as you can before Christmas, and then be sure to stop and celebrate – with family, if possible! No matter what, Christmas should be a joyous celebration. For the action items, there are some you can do from home, and some you can do in-person in Georgia, if possible. Our country is teetering on the edge, and we absolutely must win those runoff races in Georgia, so whatever you can do this week, before Christmas, to help with this effort could be the action that saves America. Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. SAVE AMERICA – SECURE THE SENATE! Volunteer for Get Out The Vote Activities from Home You can print out a letter we’ve already written and mail them to voters, you can text voters, or you can call voters, all from the comfort of your own home! We cannot emphasize enough how important this is, and how we need many more volunteers. We need you to volunteer over the next few weeks and we need you to recruit others to volunteer as well. Please sign up today! | Volunteer as a Public Poll Observer in Georgia Sign up to volunteer in Georgia! At the moment we do not have funding for travel or expenses, but we need to find volunteers who will help with the public observation of canvassing of the votes. NOTE: These are not official poll watcher positions, who in Georgia must be assigned by a political party, but they are similar. You will observe what is happening as absentee and provisional ballots are being processed and tabulated in the Board of Elections offices. | Attend Election Events in Georgia If you are able to attend any of the many tour bus stops happening across Georgia, please do! Help David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler build momentum and get the word out about how important it is for Georgians to not only make sure they vote, but to make sure they vote Republican! | Despite what Democrats and the Mainstream Media want you to believe, the Presidential election is not over. And we will continue to work on fairness and transparency for this election and future elections. We commend the actions of Sen. Ron Johnson, Rep. Andy Biggs, Director of National Intelligence John Ratcliffe and many other patriots for having the courage to stand for free and fair elections. Each in their own right have taken tremendous steps toward uncovering the truth about voter fraud in the 2020 election. While Democrats would like to ignore the rampant “irregularities" existent in the 2020 election, we will not rest until the American people can once again have trust in their electoral system. | CALL YOUR MEMBER OF CONGRESS Call your Senators and member of Congress and tell them to 1) read the documents regarding, , and ; and 2). Tell them to look at the evidence themselves, and to stop listening to the media claims that there is no evidence of fraud. Elective officials must do their own due diligence and research and stop depending on a corrupt and biased media to report the truth about the fraud. They must have the courage to do what is right, even if it is a politically difficult decision for them to make. Simply call the Capitol Hill Switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and ask to be connected to your Senators or member of Congress or visit . And, if you have a few extra minutes, email the links to the lawsuit and the hearing (linked above) to your Senators and Rep. as well. | As Christmas is quickly approaching, local Democrat leaders are proving that they are fully deserving of the lump of coal many of them will be receiving this year. Instead of listening to the experts and reopening our great nation, allowing our houses of worship, schools and small businesses to flourish once again — local Democrat leaders are going back into lockdown mode. Why? Because they feel their power starting to slip away. And the one thing we know to be true about those in power is once they have it, they will do whatever they can to not give it up. So, instead of following the science and abiding by the Constitution, local Democrats leaders are pushing forward with new COVID restrictions, curfews, and lockdowns. | TELL THE SENATE TO SUPPORT DUE PROCESS to urge every United States senator to keep an open mind and to allow the legal and constitutional processes surrounding the election and its aftermath to move forward. We urge you, do not arbitrarily refuse to consider challenges to a particular state’s electoral votes. People always speak of being on the “wrong side of history”; senators do not want to find themselves on the wrong side on this, where future generations of Americans will wonder why they refused to ensure everything was done to ensure only legal, legitimate votes elected the American President. After you sign, be sure to share it as well! | Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again Week of December 21st This week, we are learning about the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier. The tomb itself is interesting to learn about, but even more importantly is what it stands for – the brave American soldiers who died over the years in battle. It also allows us to discuss honor, patriotism, and the freedoms that are worth fighting and dying for in America. These are all topics that are not discussed anymore in many American schools. It’s so important that we teach young people to honor our heroes. Winston Churchill said, “A nation that fails to honor its heroes, soon will have no heroes to honor.” Without an understanding of our American heroes, known or unknown, that ignorance paves the way to the hatred of America and our founding ideals that we see blossoming among too many young people today. Arlington National Cemetery has a lovely and thorough write-up about the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier, with the background and meaning, and it would be interesting for older kids to read to themselves and then discuss with you. For younger kids, you could read the whole thing, or pick out parts, and then discuss it with them as well. | STOP THE STEAL ACTIVITIES A major protest is being planned for January 6th in Washington, DC by. January 6th is the day that Congress will meet to certify the Electoral College votes. If you are able to go, we encourage as many people showing up to support President Trump as possible. They are video testimonials from poll watchers and other witnesses in Georgia who explain what they saw and why it was wrong. In liberty, Jenny Beth | PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. © 2020 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Suite 116-328 Woodstock, GA 30189 |

subject: How important is electing Pro-Small Business candidates to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BfJQ1MLB64vnW88ughH_dVG0NB3Z_j2GNSWhVeFQRzPdmw6GfyHLNMNX3BuwQk_JBvRPYyZK7Y_G3fp3ivtDuSFxuNnhh-ICoXCbFYsxBZ38hyN0olaeXUpqkkX0ZDZ4QGz6duAbd3DOj-H-MIzOoVMd5q_bvqEDz42bbxHrwz7oOiB9dUgOjMLyAi7lFVz3Y2-amYcFrHi8cIkA9MImrw8X2rBzeTPDOyCIOGE_KFXKn0yq8tCoMTfs0hBw-O1IJepKyLnLfH367G-KDM4TvZRsOiGr-zukGX5Ct3g_r1zZPigXPx0bnYN4R_xVKwh06S-oNIxdkFInW8fmwVSqJjQ32jAJ7X3yvqiBBP7OdNUgTY0UGz3qF9M0YVqxIutfgmM21ZcdpzGcucpyHfcPQ4T64Oh1V97Fqq17ld2H3x7d1hFCJkliqIX6Kd2MpuX6&c=jebhR6cqdynYX_cthhE0fIZoT-bs4qDGK1_YnpfkK4QfzKyA3Jsxeg==&ch=z3wjlQpKXX4YE0nAMCDgEmD41o75dMSPqJBVxDO26u-Xp_swHImQ_A==)
---
Small businesses are the backbone of our economy, Friend.

And as a California small business owner and member of the business community, I know what it's like to be held back by endless bureaucratic red tape, pay exorbitant taxes, and face the threat of never-ending lawsuits.

That's why I strongly believe we need to support our small businesses, _especially now_. But I want to know where you stand. **How important is electing Pro-Small Business candidates to you? Take the one-click poll below to share your thoughts on the importance of saving small businesses.**[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BfJQ1MLB64vnW88ughH_dVG0NB3Z_j2GNSWhVeFQRzPdmw6GfyHLNMNX3BuwQk_JkqckfI8Dyin5b-VohDNF1wIBYsH1kue4SgJ3cwo3cE-6CcYUu0_MbUfVAbe0lriv_y0nt4wqgHJTaZroXatR-bWVYwY6SnhSiZMBIkII3rst75NA_9msaTtQFFvSCG1VgxfC7CJ52hcC0aYSHBwafnFHdKkJdcVfW19ZwGBcO_qrAf4rGoaMWVQIubfa_NllIRmBn5_1R06CCngGeAioyY6bhqu8Nfv81Cw1Y9UiFhdS8P1rxezRMcRrBBafxQIzcOB9sjtJtNXcBusNKCX7Q95oVMsxNlj6bgwLSmmOIS9acvXADh5NQ5xkqar25HWSshdsotg3RMr8EVRR3l9wowzDF5p5G6jir8XFHaBpx6iU3nftWqEYHc7O2hW_mHS_&c=jebhR6cqdynYX_cthhE0fIZoT-bs4qDGK1_YnpfkK4QfzKyA3Jsxeg==&ch=z3wjlQpKXX4YE0nAMCDgEmD41o75dMSPqJBVxDO26u-Xp_swHImQ_A==)
| **SMALL BUSINESS CANDIDATE POLL**

How important is electing pro-small business candidates to Congress to you?

body:
|

| | Hi, Derek --

On November 3rd, Virginians made their voices heard and re-elected Mark Warner to serve another six years in the Senate. Mark is grateful for the support he saw from every corner of the Commonwealth, and is ready to get back to Washington to continue his work to make life better for _every_ Virginian.

**Mark is already hard at work in the Senate, but he wants your input on which issues he should focus on in 2021. Please fill out our quick 2021 Issues Survey to let Mark know what you want him to focus on in the Senate.**

**[We need your opinion: Please take Mark's 2021 Issues Survey.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d979/53d9897e/5530950a/1c88d614/3014180751/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-2021survey2")**

Thank you,
Team Warner

body:
There is only one way to hold back the darkness and calm the storm. WE MUST WIN my Senate runoff in Georgia.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015BvDZOgz6_cAnGwYDpoHQjUJUeJ3aWiMk1YQOWEGDOTcYu9PgZpxBHnRd2wItFaHKMBbyHQDnUwYItqQiIVOv-4tWj8UuX-vcYQsWpvaVzL4Hz7QHTgB4WeTsoez1zIVt--1XMkg5gxO-ldBc372ViBtvrg-ZVnW45eJYWakidLWowLI1m3epvZcxTkCtsS2IHo3HaDtq0HZlVEyNFFlub00MXs-2j1MwYdS7vrsDxiCNc5e73R_qHxYyE3yT2nj0qOPfllnGq7GbeqYQ0O7cPYyQ8en8DCx_NzoIXw-YLLf1iIdrzeIkSMbJsm4uSUko7-FcanWvMhxGvMiLTYDv_pfdFCa6BU6JwVWC8Mhu5GNRdkK7vJ2ZD-GZn8VdCBEn4C1btlE61I1Ma3DyLi9l9pIyhz4HVTskQKY85n5UpFcHnfauipHdQ==&c=PWAo7YITcsGqneWAjqaTzz9_a3vGrWLELexuPRlVFYndf8ZwNiEMoA==&ch=pW37LusA3K1UfqCOwREa6u3ockgHAdlJUGMDjabkR3dVW3F7KCkvQQ==)
Friend,

A cold, dark winter could be upon us if Democrats take control of the Senate.

body:

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019xmM3WnK4g1B8FJ6Kx8fFQiaSADuZoON7q23TNuUJ6NdoCDOMkLuerViZN9weZschol87oQyiqwFI8x1qDYXIbuIFzT982Dt0RBA6qWUuti-CkL8yFZBATRVFQAjbPuOkv1XrlUkvjRfYboZY3reeiGOE7Mu9f0vET8Kup5J9guNc05adchObLWC49l5LMVlcMFd3EI6IZJMVoy_5lUvdtTSdXpX_y9_c73h5ckL4QIlKHWORGQU-3aySpTU-TvwEKwGC-UJdpextk7XpjLvIUAsQ3hntps_tCL4Yftk-2MSd3THuQvDpMfSf6WF4fB0MA6czgIMLbjFPJDxCyZDRUpuFYnmNBygtCgfPYsYRTn92DmiDPrL-E4e_YhDA48D5o0d6oY3Y-GYsPj7ghdFDBSDOnkRvJBqgW4_IAlmGh90PAJ0dVRYAhW43QQNM3hIbvoUa-ICBLLucmIUmX0jFw==&c=lDsT1973fVJc7ffVJ4UjBGDbK3RnNS78w8eyVEXfv4q3lRZZRPunrg==&ch=_30e8m_roro54-KhiZWgGs7cCxnBTMZinb6MVY7xYmJxH2qRIUerTQ==)

This is Dr. Ronny Jackson, former White House physician to President Trump, and Congressman-Elect for Texas' 13th Congressional District. Democrats and their Fake News media allies STILL won't admit there wasn't any evidence of voter fraud in this past election. body:

Friend,

We talk a lot about building One Indiana for All here at the Holcomb Crew. And yesterday, Governor Holcomb laid out exactly how we’re going to work toward One Indiana for All in 2021.

This plan is bold...and just like Governor Holcomb, it’s focused on solutions for Indiana’s greatest challenges.

_**“[We’re] making sure Indiana remains a state of opportunity to live, work, play, study and stay...for ALL.” - Governor Eric Holcomb**_

Indiana is continuing to fight the COVID-19 pandemic and keep Hoosiers safe, but there’s light at the end of the tunnel and we’re looking forward to the future.

Governor Holcomb is laser-focused on the same five pillars that put Indiana into a position of strength in the first place: **our economy; our infrastructure; our education, training, and workforce development; our public health; and our commitment to good government for ALL.**

You can watch Governor Holcomb lay out his 2021 agenda below ⬇️⬇️

The 2021 agenda is hard to share all in one email, but you can **[check out all of the nitty-gritty details about how we’re building One Indiana for All right here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1396faa96a98400a8ee8ab1c77f9a0cd&_e=fuzAft36QkofoPfszbUYgSE0phXoE4JgNhCiudIA84gd2HgsYobu8-Q49Kl0JaNu0IYQNJNRX_ECYpTwS0zDwwrPzz2S-6YD6SmwsBPB1pJ37VpO5Nb8V1fueyy5KbNPU0-EEfdQSIf6sdbDgQMCNRCEpaZNA-aBiX1eR5I03DgvDGlq9cPjnP5Cyil0fyTRO6xEK_a_R8GOsPKHn0mAyWr7W7N3FP55RzlJsdEezh6GU-seXyfQAc_PPBxk0Qd3CXVJmaRWNQl5JWhGnOr7vHvEiRF7cYtNlINAZ3AC_T80xaxcOp0ZNyzfVy4vQ47caI328VeTGXAp8MEmZ5ZOQA8ro0HjlJB_xhlQgu4bmx8kqF8APP72ftZGLang-b5reHQwTc0SQjTw4X7pNEcm3Elx99bt3a73leXk_1HcG5O3_67hZKrup4VbPRxPJuNbmBUmOo-EjSSlTrsdxpv0LAXnyaT3bwFq3tWJWqY1XvQKWtF4StP1ytqtmD5wOXkq3jMWP_WonBMAHRjnQya2XQ%3D%3D)**

It’s all about creating more opportunity for ALL Hoosiers, continuing to lead the nation in crucial areas like infrastructure, and helping our economy break records again. We’re addressing our biggest challenges -- like continuing to manage our way through this pandemic, making sure our schools are fully-funded, and looking at ways to address teacher compensation. And we’re taking care of the basics, like passing Indiana’s ninth straight balanced budget.

We’re taking an ambitious approach to this challenge and we’re confident that we can deliver for ALL Hoosiers, but we need to embrace civility, community, and teamwork.

**“Civility isn’t just an end in itself. It’s not rhetorical, it’s practice. It’s about forging a team, taking advantage of diverse talents and ideas, and getting things done. That’s how we, all of us, will take Indiana and our lives to the Next Level.” – Governor Eric Holcomb**

Friend, we know this is a big undertaking – and we’re going to need your support every step of the way.

name: Rainee Taylor, Evergreen
subject: Putting big dreams in real terms
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
These aren't wishes.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=5272%2E53494%2EGt9F7s) Friend, _"A goal without a plan is just a wish."_ Whoever said that was on to something. Whether it's a simple New Year's resolution or a vision for a clean energy future, simply having a goal is rarely enough to put things in motion. To get anything done (especially on a national scale), you have to have plans that put your big dreams in real terms. Often, that's what makes powerful people sit up and pay attention. That's why Evergreen has worked so hard this year to produce and promote detailed plans and policy memos to move bold climate action to the top of America's agenda. Now, we're putting them all at your fingertips—because you're a part of this work, too. **[Now live, you can find all of our plans and policy memos in Evergreen's Policy Hub. Click here to start exploring!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1349?t=3&akid=5272%2E53494%2EGt9F7s)** | [CHECK IT OUT ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1349?t=4&akid=5272%2E53494%2EGt9F7s)
---
Every memo or report in our Policy Hub is a reminder that there's more to bold climate action than ending the climate crisis.
Bold climate action means delivering environmental justice, so everyone has clean water and air, regardless of their race or income. It means getting people working again, in jobs that promise dignity and wages that can support a family. It means loosening the grip of the fossil fuel industry over our economy and our politics, so that policymakers can be more responsive to the will of voters.
These aren't wishes. They're goals that we will achieve by tenaciously advocating for smart climate policies every day.
**[Curious to read our plans for yourself? Check out our new Policy Hub to see what we've been working on this year.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1349?t=5&akid=5272%2E53494%2EGt9F7s)**
I'm thrilled that Evergreen has earned a place at the center of climate policy conversations going into 2021. With a new administration ready to take the reins, we have many reasons for hope—and lots of exciting work ahead.
Thanks for being on this ride with us.
Rainee Taylor
Digital Strategist, Evergreen
[DONATE FOR MORE
BOLD CLIMATE POLICY ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1350?t=6&akid=5272%2E53494%2EGt9F7s)
---

subject: Proud to carry
body:
Are you with me?

| Patriot,
I am a firm believer in our Constitution and the great country our Founding Fathers fought for. The liberal agenda seeks to weaken our constitutional rights, starting with our Second Amendment.

| Not only am I proud to be the youngest GOP woman in the 117th Congress at age 32, I am also proud to be a member of the NRA. I believe in our right to protect ourselves, our families, and our freedom. Join me and many other patriotic Americans in this fight for our right to protect ourselves!

He will be looking out for your name!
.

Friend,
As we approach the holidays, I encourage you to remember all that you are thankful for. Whether it be for your friends, family, or living in the greatest country on earth, I encourage you to count your blessings. Regardless of politics, this is a time to rejoice for the things that we are most thankful for.
2020 has been a challenging year for everyone. Navigating the unknowns of the pandemic is no easy task, and my team and I are thankful to be led by such a strong leader. President Trump and his family have given so much to the American people to ensure that their needs are met and that we can return to normalcy after the pandemic.
My team and I have decided to send President Trump and the First Family a Christmas card as a small token of our appreciation. We are extending the invitation to sign the card to committed patriots on our team like you, Friend.

clean_body: He will be looking out for your name! . == Friend, As we approach the holidays, I encourage you to remember all that you are thankful for. Whether it be for your friends, family, or living in the greatest country on earth, I encourage you to count your blessings. Regardless of politics, this is a time to rejoice for the things that we are most thankful for. 2020 has been a challenging year for everyone. Navigating the unknowns of the pandemic is no easy task, and my team and I are thankful to be led by such a strong leader. President Trump and his family have given so much to the American people to ensure that their needs are met and that we can return to normalcy after the pandemic. My team and I have decided to send President Trump and the First Family a Christmas card as a small token of our appreciation. We are extending the invitation to sign the card to committed patriots on our team like you, Friend. == == Sign the card today -> ****==** Your continued support is much appreciated, Congressman Rodney Davis Can Rodney count on you to chip in $5, $10, $15 or any other amount towards his 2022 re-election campaign to keep Downstate Illinois red? == == Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress == PO BOX 344 Taylorville, IL 62568 This message reflects the opinions and representations of the Rodney for Congress. In January, more Republican women than ever before will be sworn into the House of Representatives. == **== == Ten members of this new caucus, including my friend Ashley Hinson from Iowa's First Congressional District, managed to flip their districts from blue to red. They ran tough races against radical left candidates handpicked by partisan Nancy Pelosi, and came out on top. == == After eight years in Congress serving Missouri's second district, I could not be more excited to welcome these freshmen Congresswomen to Washington and fight with them to protect conservative values. This election proved that Americans don't believe in the Democrats' radical left agenda -- they are counting on us to protect life and liberty. Because of supporters like you, Friend, we finally proved to partisan Pelosi, socialist AOC, and the rest of the radical Democrats that Republican values and female values are one in the same. == Will you join me in supporting Ashley Hinson and the rest of the freshmen Congresswomen as they head to Washington in January?== == Thank You, Congresswoman Ann Wagner ==** | PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 == | | ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 811, Marion, IA 52302 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
New polling shows both Democratic candidates in Georgia leading by ONE point. We must maintain that lead until January 5 to get the change we demand.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/22861056/265786505/-293505166?refcode=em122120-PM-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNjhhMmJiLWU2NDMtZWIxMS1hNjA3LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B7376TUo0a460IdVH6m1j2u_rGOkpt2zr7RJ7Rd_6EI=)
Team,
New polling has just arrived here in Georgia, and the data looks VERY promising. Right now, Dems are up by ONE point in both U.S. Senate runoff elections.
Friend, this is a direct result of the tireless efforts of grassroots organizations like Georgia Blue Project all across the state working 24/7 to make sure that Democrats finish the job and send unelected Senator Kelly Loeffler and crooked Senator David Perdue packing in January.
But if we have learned one thing from this election cycle, it's that when polls show things aren't going their way, Re-Trump-licans will try to bury the problem with money from corporate PACs. Already, Mitch McConnell is sending $91 million to Georgia to attack both Democratic candidates.
So far, over 1 million Georgians have voted in the runoff elections. Historically, our state sees a 60% drop in turnout for runoffs — **_this year we are only 8% behind the pace of voting in the general election._**
**The numbers are in our favor and our strategy is paying dividends. We cannot waste this moment. Right now, the Georgia Blue Project is running digital ads focused on further assisting this historic surge in early voting, specifically targeting Black male voters and youth voters in rural areas of Georgia.**
[**_We need your help to get the funds necessary to push our limits and expand the audience to as many voters as possible. Friend, can you spare $20 or whatever you can give TODAY to help us reach these key demographics before it's too late?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/22861057/265786506/-293505166?refcode=em122120-PM-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNjhhMmJiLWU2NDMtZWIxMS1hNjA3LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B7376TUo0a460IdVH6m1j2u_rGOkpt2zr7RJ7Rd_6EI=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Donald Trump Jr.: “The Fate of Our Country is in Your Hands, Georgia”
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7f575836d691/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-67219?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
|
---
| Folks, Donald Trump Jr. was here just a few days ago campaigning with Senator Perdue from Ocilla to Ringgold reminding everyone the fate of our country is in Georgia's hands. He's right -- it's up to us.
Please consider sharing with your friends and families Donald Trump Jr.'s [latest op-ed](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=72349edefc&e=02cd889ad3) in Fox News and encourage them to _**get out and vote before Christmas!**_

_**Vote Loeffler and Perdue – Georgia, here's what's at stake in Jan. 5 runoff elections**_ By Donald Trump Jr. _Congressman-elect Burgess Owens, R-Utah, tells ‘Fox & Friends’ voters in Georgia will help pull America out of the ‘abyss of socialism.’_ _The fate of our country is in your hands, Georgia. The only thing stopping radical liberal policies from becoming law is your vote._ _If you believe in the promises President Donald Trump delivered on, you must support Sens. Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue. They will be a backstop against House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y., and the radical squad from undoing his record for the American people. _ _If you believe the 2020 election was rigged in favor of Democrats, you’re not alone. But you cannot stay home on Jan. 5. Sitting out this crucial election will ENSURE Democrats win – and Georgia and America can’t afford to let that happen. _ _A Democrat majority in the Senate will work to dismantle everything we’ve fought so hard for. Democrats will immediately abolish the filibuster, allowing them to pass any far-left policy they want with a simple majority vote._ _My friends Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue are the only things standing between dangerous, jobs-killing liberal policies that hurt hardworking Georgians from being passed through Congress. _ _The economy is on the ballot in Georgia. Democrats want more lockdowns, they have blocked direct payments to hardworking Americans who lost income during COVID, and they want to repeal the Trump tax cuts that put money back in the pockets of Americans._ _Energy and American jobs are on the ballot in Georgia. If Democrats win in Georgia, the House and Senate will try to pass the jobs-killing Green New Deal, which would put thousands of Georgia businesses out of business and workers out of jobs._ _Our military is on the ballot in Georgia. Democrats will cut military spending – and troops at Fort Benning and Fort Gordon – and their families will feel it._ _Stand up for the America First agenda – stand up for everything my father is fighting for._ _Your family’s safety is on the ballot in Georgia. Progressives in Pelosi’s conference have called for defunding the police – at a time when our cities and suburbs have faced terrifying civil unrest. Georgians know we need to stand by our men and women in blue._ _Border security is on the ballot. Democrats want open borders, allowing criminals and drugs to flow freely into the U.S. They want Georgians' agriculture jobs to be given to illegal immigrants._ _The Supreme Court is on the ballot in Georgia. Democrats want to pack the Supreme Court, but if Republicans keep control of the Senate, with Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue, they will stop the liberal takeover of the Supreme Court._ _National security is on the ballot in Georgia. Democrats want to re-enter the dangerous Iran nuclear deal, which will give money back to the largest state sponsor of terror in the world, and put Iran on a glide-path to get a nuclear weapon. _ _Sens. Loeffler and Perdue will be votes against this backward, failed policy._ _American health care is on the ballot in Georgia. Even after the pandemic that hurt so many Americans, Democrats want to return to one-size-fits-all government-run health care. Georgians want low costs, quality care and choice for their health care. _ _Stand up for the America First agenda – stand up for everything my father is fighting for – and vote for Republicans Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue for U.S. Senate. _
Read the op-ed on FoxNews.com [here.](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9c9d6df70e&e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: New Obama State Department Emails Show Ukraine Prosecutor General Was Pitched ‘High-Level’ Access to Hillary Clinton’s Presidential Campaign
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it received 38 pages of records from the State Department revealing that then-United States Deputy Chief of Mission to Ukraine and current Deputy Assistant Secretary of State for European and Eurasian Affairs George Kent sent an email to then-Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch stating that Ukraine Prosecutor General Yuriy Lutsenko informed Kent that he was offered “high-level” access to Hillary Clinton’s presidential campaign by the same firm that represented Burisma Holdings.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 21, 2020
---|---|---

Dozens of other crimes—including assault and harassment—will be excused under the preposterous measure if suspects are poor, mentally ill or addicted to drugs. It is being crafted as a poverty defense and will allow municipal court judges to dismiss a multitude of crimes if poverty, mental illness or a substance-abuse disorder drove the perpetrator to commit them. It is a difficult foreign grant to swallow as local law enforcement agencies nationwide suffer through major budget cuts at the request of the increasingly powerful Black Lives Matter (BLM) movement. Dozens of other crimes—including assault and harassment—will be excused under the preposterous measure if suspects are poor, mentally ill or addicted to drugs. It is being crafted as a poverty defense and will allow municipal court judges to dismiss a multitude of crimes if poverty, mental illness or a substance-abuse disorder drove the perpetrator to commit them. == ---|--- | | | | | While police departments across the United States are being defunded to appease leftists, the federal government is dedicating hundreds of thousands of dollars to advance “gender equality” in the “police forces” of a Latin American nation. It is a difficult foreign grant to swallow as local law enforcement agencies nationwide suffer through major budget cuts at the request of the increasingly powerful Black Lives Matter (BLM) movement. ---|--- | | | | | “This victory will help the public understand Mayor Buttigieg’s plan to create special ID cards to make it easier for illegal aliens to stay in the United States contrary to law,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “It is curious that the mayor fought us for so long on this simple request for information.” ---|--- | | | = Breitbart Judicial Watch, a conservative legal advocacy group, said, “Congress should reprimand three of its members for participating with financiers of Islamic terrorism in a conference sponsored by an anti-Semitic group with deep ties to Hamas, the Palestinian extremist group that calls for eradicating the state of Israel.” = == The Washington Times Attorney General William P. Barr will exit the Justice Department leaving behind a string of probes into misconduct by Obama-era officials that have mostly come up empty and sorely disappointed President Trump and his allies. == == CBN If you only follow the establishment media, you’ll only see stories about how almost every case filed by President Trump’s legal team has been rejected by the courts. But the legal battle they’re fighting is destined to go through the appeals process no matter what. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant?=
subject: 500 Words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bill Bryant
body:
In April 2018, at the suggestion of several supporters, I emailed my first “500 Words”, an update of what I’m up to and thinking about, and said I’d do it again if enough people wanted me to. A few years later, and here we are. You can access previous editions here. (https://us18.campaign-archive.com/home/?u=c5ac11f23df6ef9dfb9e604c5&id=300e6cee96)

You are receiving this because at some point you were identified as a supporter, someone who wants to keep in touch, or you asked to be added to the list. If you know somebody who would like to receive this, have them email me at billbryantwa@gmail.com (mailto:billbryantwa@gmail.com) . If you want to unsubscribe, please click the unsubscribe link at the bottom of this email.

** WHAT I'VE BEEN DOING
------------------------------------------------------------

My summer was filled with cycling, fishing, backpacking, and a climb up Glacier Peak.

By the end of August, I was so disgusted with how poorly Gov. Inslee was handling Washington’s finances that I wrote this op-ed (https://mcusercontent.com/c5ac11f23df6ef9dfb9e604c5/files/d0d330f9-c4da-490f-811a-69c25b04875e/Bryant_Article.pdf) on what I think should be done.

In late September-early October, Barbara and I explored the Mountain West: Glacier, Bozeman, Little Big Horn, the Big Horn Valley, Denver, the Wind River Mntns, Tetons, Yellowstone: hiking, cycling, fishing, eating outside in very chilly temps: good times.

Then we came home, and in Spokane picked up Stegner. Yes, I named him after Wallace, one of my favorite authors. Meet the new member of our family. (https://www.facebook.com/BillBryantWA/videos/4822201377821691)

** WHAT I'VE BEEN THINKING ABOUT
------------------------------------------------------------

For Christians, now is our season of Advent. For me, Advent is a time of reflection and hope.

It is doubly so this year in the aftermath a campaign that focused more on what parties are against, than on what we can do and become.

In the coming weeks I hope we reflect on what together we can become and do. Of course, we won’t always agree, but we can agree to listen and work together.

I hope that during these next weeks, especially after losing the presidency and the governorship, WA Republicans will reflect on what our party can do. Let’s focus on how a multitude of public school choices can ensure every child gets a quality education regardless of their income or zip code. Let’s propose market-based solutions for reducing carbon emissions and a plan for accelerating the development of modular nuclear technology. Let’s demonstrate our pragmatism by offering transportation choices that reduce commute times and move freight better. Let’s be true to our party’s origins and dedicate ourselves to ensuring everyone enjoys liberty and access to justice. Let’s demonstrate our commitment to the dignity of life by offering every child in Washington medical and dental care.

My wish for all of us this Advent, when Christians celebrate the arrival of the Light, is that each of us will look forward to we can do and become, and that what we focus on will give others hope.

** WHAT I'VE BEEN READING
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.amazon.com/North-Hope-Daughters-Arctic-Journey/dp/0310328764

https://www.amazon.com/Last-Stand-Custer-Sitting-Bighorn/dp/0143119605/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=The+Last+Stand+%3A+Custer%2C+Sitting+Bull%2C+and+the+Battle+of+the+Little+Bighorn%2C+by+Nathaniel+Philbrick.&qid=1608491406&s=books&sr=1-1

North of Hope, by Shannon Polson. (https://www.amazon.com/North-Hope-Daughters-Arctic-Journey/dp/0310328764) Shannon returns to the arctic river where her parents were killed when a grizzly ripped into their tent, and explores grief, what’s important in life, and grace. This is a beautiful book that is hard to put down.

The Last Stand: Custer, Sitting Bull, and the Battle of the Little Bighorn, by Nathaniel Philbrick. (https://www.amazon.com/Last-Stand-Custer-Sitting-Bighorn/dp/0143119605/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=The+Last+Stand+%3A+Custer%2C+Sitting+Bull%2C+and+the+Battle+of+the+Little+Bighorn%2C+by+Nathaniel+Philbrick.&qid=1608491406&s=books&sr=1-1) If you’ve ever wanted to read just one good book on why and what happened at the Battle of Little Big Horn, this is it.

** WHAT'S NEXT
------------------------------------------------------------

A few volunteers who love crunching numbers (and are good at it) and I will be analyzing what we can learn from the 2020 governor’s race. By February, we’ll have a summary. If you want a copy, shoot me an email.

Barbara & I wish everyone Merry Christmas, Happy Chanukah, a blessed New Year.

============================================================
